'''Spukami''' were a common breed of [[Corellia]]n [[Cat|housecats]] that hunted vermin. The [[Fed-Dub Protective Services]] [[Spukami pocket blaster]], manufactured on the nearby [[Corellian system|Corellia system]] worlds of [[Talus]] and [[Tralus]], was named after the [[species]].<ref name="Gadgets and Gear" />

==Behind the scenes==
Spukami were mentioned in the [[2019]] [[canon]] ''[[Fantasy Flight Games]]'' [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Gadgets and Gear]]''.<ref name="Gadgets and Gear" /> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, spukami was the plural form of the creature's name,<ref name="Suns of Fortune">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref> while [[Spukami/Legends|spukamas]] was the singular.<ref name="Shadow Games">''[[Shadow Games]]''</ref>
